title: Deliciously Crunchy Mexican Chicken Tacos
description: A mustardy and crunchy Mexican dish featuring sazon and clay-pot-cooked chicken, served in a lacquerware bowl, halal-friendly and full of energizing flavors from Jalisco-style cuisine
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the chicken, sazon seasoning, and mustard until the chicken is well coated.
Heat the olive oil in a large clay pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and jalapeno pepper to the clay pot and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the chicken to the clay pot and cook until it is browned on all sides and cooked through.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a portion of the chicken onto a tortilla and topping with shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, and a sprinkle of crushed tortilla chips.
Serve the tacos in a lacquerware bowl and top with a dollop of sour cream.
Garnish with additional diced tomatoes and shredded lettuce if desired.
